_comment: Offline jobs run by `npm run offline:all` (scripts/offline/run-all.ts). Add/remove/toggle freely — each runs in order even if a prior one fails. Findings land in reckons-workspace/knowledge.pending.jsonl for review in Reckons.AI. cmd runs in bash, so ${VAR:-default} and pipes work.

jobs.name: alignment-sweep
jobs.desc: TTL parse / asset paths / namespace typos / stale LEAP + branch-align --suggest + kb-align → pending questions

jobs.name: visual-diff
jobs.desc: Local-VLM visual regression prod↔dev (needs OLLAMA_BASE_URL; set VISUAL_DIFF_BASE / VISUAL_DIFF_HEAD)
